scaled_oracle_cases.description: File with two tumors (mu has 3 values).
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that multi-tumor C and p* parsing uses transposition logic (list of lists) instead of flat list.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: For a file with two tumors, C must be a list of two inner lists, each of length 2.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior might return flat list or incorrectly parse.
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
fname = 'theta_multitumor.txt'
sample = 'NLL\tmu\tC\tp*\n10.0\t0.5,0.3,0.2\t2,3:4,5\t0.6,0.4\n'
with open(fname, 'w') as f:
    f.write(sample)
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a test with two tumors to verify nested list output.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: File with alphabetic placeholders in C and p*.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that non-digit C values and alphabetic p* values are converted to None.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: C entries that are not all digits become None; p* entries that are alphabetic become None.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior might attempt int() on non-digit or float() on alphabetic, causing ValueError.
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
fname = 'theta_placeholder.txt'
sample = 'NLL\tmu\tC\tp*\n8.0\t0.6,0.4\tX:Y\tA,B\n'
with open(fname, 'w') as f:
    f.write(sample)
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a test with placeholder values to verify None handling.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: File with mu having only normal fraction (no tumor).
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that when mu has only one number, mu_tumors is an empty list and C/p* are parsed as single-tumor format.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: mu_tumors must be an empty list; C must be list of lists with one inner list; p* list of floats.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior might treat single mu as normal only but then try to access mu_tumors[0] or produce error.
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
fname = 'theta_no_tumor.txt'
sample = 'NLL\tmu\tC\tp*\n5.0\t1.0\t1:2\t0.5,0.5\n'
with open(fname, 'w') as f:
    f.write(sample)
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a test with only normal fraction to verify empty mu_tumors.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: File with values in scientific notation.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that scientific notation floats are correctly parsed.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: NLL and p* values in scientific notation must convert to float.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior might try to parse as plain numbers and fail or produce string.
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
fname = 'theta_sci.txt'
sample = 'NLL\tmu\tC\tp*\n1.2e-5\t0.4,0.6\t2:3\t1e-2,2e-1\n'
with open(fname, 'w') as f:
    f.write(sample)
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a test with scientific notation to verify robust parsing.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: File with leading zeros in numeric values.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that leading zeros in numeric strings are correctly handled (float conversion strips them).
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: Values like 012.3 must parse to 12.3; 00.1 to 0.1.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior might treat leading zeros as string or cause type error if using int conversion incorrectly.
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
fname = 'theta_leading_zeros.txt'
sample = 'NLL\tmu\tC\tp*\n012.3\t0.40,0.60\t02:03\t00.1,00.2\n'
with open(fname, 'w') as f:
    f.write(sample)
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a test with leading zeros to verify robustness.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: File with trailing spaces in fields.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Verify that trailing spaces in fields are handled (float() strips spaces, split respects tabs).
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: Values with trailing spaces must parse to correct numbers.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Old seed behavior might include spaces in string or fail on split not stripping.
scaled_oracle_cases.setup_code:
fname = 'theta_trailing_spaces.txt'
sample = 'NLL\tmu\tC\tp*\n12.5   \t0.4,0.6   \t2:3   \t0.1,0.2   \n'
with open(fname, 'w') as f:
    f.write(sample)
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a test with trailing spaces to verify robustness.
